positive: A stylized and whimsical abstract pattern featuring scattered celestial bodies and constellations. The main elements are crescent moons, five-pointed stars of varying sizes, and delicate cosmic dust trails forming gentle spirals. The arrangement should be non-repeating but harmonious, centered for maximum impact. Style: Geometric minimalist line art mixed with soft, watercolor-like gradients. Color Palette: Deep navy blue, ethereal teal, muted gold, and creamy ivory. Composition: High contrast silhouettes against a dark background, ensuring the design pops on fabric. Lighting: Soft, omnidirectional ambient light for clean edges. Ideal for textile printing.
negative: photorealistic, sketch, graffiti, grunge, text, logo, signature, watermark, blurry, noisy, out of frame, bad anatomy, low resolution, dirty, cropped, duplicate, extra limbs, solid color background
